sources.scope: Implemented Singapore resident PIT models, source registry and calculation tests.
Implemented UK non-savings Income Tax models for England, Wales and Northern Ireland.
Headline PIT rates and linked individual tax summaries for 147 territories. This is an implementation-planning index, not a source for calculator parameters.

Full personal-tax chapters in the 2025-26 Worldwide Personal Tax and Immigration Guide, current as of 1 October 2025 with exceptions noted. Contact-only entries in the guide's other-jurisdictions section are excluded from classification evidence.
